metadata.description: Complete 6-phase JS/TS development pipeline for Claude Code — from brainstorm (or investigation) to production-ready, tested, documented code. Ships 7 phase agents, 2 orchestrator skills, 5 slash commands, and a validated state schema.

plugins.name: ai-tools
plugins.description: Agent-first 6-phase JS/TS development pipeline: independent agents for each phase, parallel code review, scoped tools, schema-validated state. Ships /pipeline-* slash commands. Falls back to skill-based orchestration on skill-only installs.
